---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2022 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Internships

1.  TUSAŞ (Türk Havacılık Uzay Sanayii A.Ş.), Candidate Engineer, 2025 - ongoing

2.  TUSAŞ (Türk Havacılık Uzay Sanayii A.Ş.), Intern, 2025

3.  ASTOR A.Ş., Intern, 2025

# Projects

1.  Graduation Project (2025 - ongoing): Indoor Material Handling Optimization: Selected for the TUSAŞ LIFT UP Industry-Oriented Graduation Project Program. Currently modeling and optimizing indoor material transportation flows to minimize lead times and operational costs. Developing a logistic framework to improve internal part movement efficiency through mathematical modeling and system design.

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python, AutoCAD, MS Office, MS Project

[Click to see my CV!](CV.pdf)
